text.title: In-Issue Ad Format Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping subscriber count, baseline availability, library composition, and cadence compliance to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator have ≥500 subs, a baseline, and a product to push?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — list too small or no destination

branch.when: baseline.computed_at OLDER THAN 30 days OR baseline_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — add a 'none' issue to reset trust

text.example: 5200 subs + product live + baseline 18 days old + 4 named formats + caps respected + 'none' issue present + typed destinations → APPROVE.
